```{r}
##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201319_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201319_h2o, rf_auc_aa201319_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201319_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201319_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201319 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201319, rf_auc_aa201319)
colnames(auc_aa_201319) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201319) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201319_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201319_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201319, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201319.csv")



#**YW201332**
#glm_h20
aa201332_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201332_h2o <- extract(aa201332_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201332_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201332_h2o)
glm_auc_aa201332_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201332_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa201332_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201332<- extract(aa201332_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201332 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201332)
glm_auc_aa201332 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201332, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa201332_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201332_h2o <- extract(aa201332_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201332_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201332_h2o)
rf_auc_aa201332_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201332_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa201332_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201332<- extract(aa201332_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201332 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201332)
rf_auc_aa201332 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201332, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201332_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201332_h2o, rf_auc_aa201332_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201332_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201332_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201332 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201332, rf_auc_aa201332)
colnames(auc_aa_201332) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201332) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201332_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201332_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201332, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201332.csv")



#**YW201345**
#glm_h20
aa201345_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201345_h2o <- extract(aa201345_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201345_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201345_h2o)
glm_auc_aa201345_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201345_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa201345_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201345<- extract(aa201345_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201345 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201345)
glm_auc_aa201345 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201345, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa201345_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201345_h2o <- extract(aa201345_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201345_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201345_h2o)
rf_auc_aa201345_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201345_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa201345_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201345<- extract(aa201345_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201345 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201345)
rf_auc_aa201345 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201345, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201345_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201345_h2o, rf_auc_aa201345_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201345_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201345_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201345 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201345, rf_auc_aa201345)
colnames(auc_aa_201345) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201345) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201345_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201345_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201345, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201345.csv")


#**YW201919**
#glm_h20
aa201919_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201919_h2o <- extract(aa201919_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201919_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201919_h2o)
glm_auc_aa201919_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201919_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa201919_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201919<- extract(aa201919_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201919 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201919)
glm_auc_aa201919 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201919, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa201919_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201919_h2o <- extract(aa201919_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201919_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201919_h2o)
rf_auc_aa201919_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201919_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa201919_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201919<- extract(aa201919_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201919 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201919)
rf_auc_aa201919 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201919, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201919_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201919_h2o, rf_auc_aa201919_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201919_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201919_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201919 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201919, rf_auc_aa201919)
colnames(auc_aa_201919) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201919) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201919_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201919_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201919, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201919.csv")



#**YW201932**
#glm_h20
aa201932_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201932_h2o <- extract(aa201932_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201932_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201932_h2o)
glm_auc_aa201932_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201932_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa201932_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201932<- extract(aa201932_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201932 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201932)
glm_auc_aa201932 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201932, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa201932_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201932_h2o <- extract(aa201932_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201932_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201932_h2o)
rf_auc_aa201932_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201932_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa201932_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201932<- extract(aa201932_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201932 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201932)
rf_auc_aa201932 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201932, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201932_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201932_h2o, rf_auc_aa201932_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201932_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201932_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201932 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201932, rf_auc_aa201932)
colnames(auc_aa_201932) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201932) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201932_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201932_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201932, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201932.csv")



#**YW201945**
#glm_h20
aa201945_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201945_h2o <- extract(aa201945_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201945_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201945_h2o)
glm_auc_aa201945_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201945_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa201945_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa201945<- extract(aa201945_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa201945 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa201945)
glm_auc_aa201945 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa201945, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa201945_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201945_h2o <- extract(aa201945_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201945_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201945_h2o)
rf_auc_aa201945_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201945_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa201945_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa201945<- extract(aa201945_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa201945 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa201945)
rf_auc_aa201945 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa201945, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_201945_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201945_h2o, rf_auc_aa201945_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_201945_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201945_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_201945 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa201945, rf_auc_aa201945)
colnames(auc_aa_201945) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_201945) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_201945_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201945_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_201945, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201945.csv")



#**YW202119**
#glm_h20
aa202119_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202119_h2o <- extract(aa202119_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202119_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202119_h2o)
glm_auc_aa202119_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202119_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa202119_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202119<- extract(aa202119_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202119 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202119)
glm_auc_aa202119 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202119, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa202119_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202119_h2o <- extract(aa202119_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202119_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202119_h2o)
rf_auc_aa202119_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202119_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa202119_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202119<- extract(aa202119_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202119 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202119)
rf_auc_aa202119 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202119, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_202119_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202119_h2o, rf_auc_aa202119_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_202119_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202119_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_202119 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202119, rf_auc_aa202119)
colnames(auc_aa_202119) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202119) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_202119_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202119_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_202119, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202119.csv")



#**YW202132**
#glm_h20
aa202132_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202132_h2o <- extract(aa202132_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202132_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202132_h2o)
glm_auc_aa202132_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202132_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa202132_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202132<- extract(aa202132_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202132 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202132)
glm_auc_aa202132 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202132, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa202132_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202132_h2o <- extract(aa202132_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202132_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202132_h2o)
rf_auc_aa202132_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202132_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa202132_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202132<- extract(aa202132_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202132 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202132)
rf_auc_aa202132 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202132, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_202132_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202132_h2o, rf_auc_aa202132_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_202132_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202132_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_202132 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202132, rf_auc_aa202132)
colnames(auc_aa_202132) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202132) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_202132_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202132_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_202132, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202132.csv")



#**YW202145**
#glm_h20
aa202145_h2o_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202145_h2o <- extract(aa202145_h2o_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202145_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202145_h2o)
glm_auc_aa202145_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202145_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#glm
aa202145_glm <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_glm.tif")
glm_test_pred_aa202145<- extract(aa202145_glm, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
glm_DFauc_aa202145 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, glm_test_pred_aa202145)
glm_auc_aa202145 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(glm_DFauc_aa202145, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf_h20
aa202145_h2o_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202145_h2o <- extract(aa202145_h2o_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202145_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202145_h2o)
rf_auc_aa202145_h2o <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202145_h2o, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)

#rf
aa202145_rf <- raster("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_rf.tif")
rf_test_pred_aa202145<- extract(aa202145_rf, test_coords_aa, pos_label =1)
rf_DFauc_aa202145 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, rf_test_pred_aa202145)
rf_auc_aa202145 <- PresenceAbsence ::auc(rf_DFauc_aa202145, which.model = TRUE, na.rm=TRUE)


##**AUC Dataframe**
auc_aa_202145_h2o <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202145_h2o, rf_auc_aa202145_h2o)
colnames(auc_aa_202145_h2o) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202145_h2o) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

auc_aa_202145 <- rbind(glm_auc_aa202145, rf_auc_aa202145)
colnames(auc_aa_202145) <- c("AUC", "StdDev")
rownames(auc_aa_202145) <-c("GLM", "Rf")

write.csv(auc_aa_202145_h2o, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202145_h2o.csv")
write.csv(auc_aa_202145, "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202145.csv")



```


Ensemble Model -cq
```{r}

#**YW201319*
cq201319_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_glm.tif")
cq201319_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_h2o_glm.tif")
cq201319_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_rf.tif")
cq201319_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201319_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201319 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201319.csv")
auc_cq_201319_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201319_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201319 <- stack(x = c(cq201319_glm, cq201319_rf))
weights_cq201319 <- auc_cq_201319$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201319$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201319 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201319, w = weights_cq201319)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201319)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201319, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201319.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201319 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201319, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201319 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201319)
auc_ensemble_cq201319<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201319, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201319.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201319_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201319_h2o_glm, cq201319_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201319_h2o <- auc_cq_201319_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201319_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201319_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201319_h2o, w = weights_cq201319_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201319_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201319_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201319_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201319_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201319_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201319_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201319_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201319_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201319_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201319_h2o.csv")

#**YW201332*
cq201332_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_glm.tif")
cq201332_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_h2o_glm.tif")
cq201332_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_rf.tif")
cq201332_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201332_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201332 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201332.csv")
auc_cq_201332_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201332_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201332 <- stack(x = c(cq201332_glm, cq201332_rf))
weights_cq201332 <- auc_cq_201332$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201332$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201332 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201332, w = weights_cq201332)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201332)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201332, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201332.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201332 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201332, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201332 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201332)
auc_ensemble_cq201332<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201332, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201332.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201332_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201332_h2o_glm, cq201332_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201332_h2o <- auc_cq_201332_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201332_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201332_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201332_h2o, w = weights_cq201332_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201332_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201332_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201332_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201332_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201332_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201332_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201332_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201332_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201332_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201332_h2o.csv")


#**YW201345*
cq201345_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_glm.tif")
cq201345_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_h2o_glm.tif")
cq201345_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_rf.tif")
cq201345_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201345_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201345 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201345.csv")
auc_cq_201345_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201345_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201345 <- stack(x = c(cq201345_glm, cq201345_rf))
weights_cq201345 <- auc_cq_201345$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201345$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201345 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201345, w = weights_cq201345)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201345)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201345, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201345.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201345 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201345, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201345 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201345)
auc_ensemble_cq201345<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201345, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201345.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201345_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201345_h2o_glm, cq201345_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201345_h2o <- auc_cq_201345_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201345_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201345_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201345_h2o, w = weights_cq201345_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201345_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201345_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201345_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201345_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201345_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201345_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201345_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201345_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201345_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201345_h2o.csv")


#YW201919
cq201919_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_glm.tif")
cq201919_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_h2o_glm.tif")
cq201919_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_rf.tif")
cq201919_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201919_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201919 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201919.csv")
auc_cq_201919_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201919_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201919 <- stack(x = c(cq201919_glm, cq201919_rf))
weights_cq201919 <- auc_cq_201919$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201919$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201919 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201919, w = weights_cq201919)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201919)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201919, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201919.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201919 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201919, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201919 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201919)
auc_ensemble_cq201919<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201919, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201919.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201919_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201919_h2o_glm, cq201919_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201919_h2o <- auc_cq_201919_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201919_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201919_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201919_h2o, w = weights_cq201919_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201919_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201919_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201919_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201919_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201919_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201919_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201919_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201919_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201919_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201919_h2o.csv")

cq201932_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_glm.tif")
cq201932_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_h2o_glm.tif")

cq201932_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201932_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201932 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201932.csv")
auc_cq_201932_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201932_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201932 <- stack(x = c(cq201932_glm, cq201932_rf))
weights_cq201932 <- auc_cq_201932$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201932$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201932 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201932, w = weights_cq201932)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201932)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201932, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201932.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201932 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201932, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201932 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201932)
auc_ensemble_cq201932<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201932, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201932.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201932_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201932_h2o_glm, cq201932_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201932_h2o <- auc_cq_201932_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201932_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201932_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201932_h2o, w = weights_cq201932_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201932_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201932_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201932_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201932_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201932_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201932_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201932_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201932_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201932_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201932_h2o.csv")



#**YW201945**
cq201945_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_glm.tif")
cq201945_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_h2o_glm.tif")
cq201945_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_rf.tif")
cq201945_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq201945_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_201945 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201945.csv")
auc_cq_201945_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_201945_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq201945 <- stack(x = c(cq201945_glm, cq201945_rf))
weights_cq201945 <- auc_cq_201945$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201945$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq201945 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201945, w = weights_cq201945)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201945)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201945, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201945.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201945 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201945, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201945 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201945)
auc_ensemble_cq201945<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201945, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201945.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq201945_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq201945_h2o_glm, cq201945_h2o_rf))
weights_cq201945_h2o <- auc_cq_201945_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_201945_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq201945_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq201945_h2o, w = weights_cq201945_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq201945_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq201945_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq201945_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq201945_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq201945_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq201945_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq201945_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq201945_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq201945_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq201945_h2o.csv")



#**YW202119*
cq202119_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_glm.tif")
cq202119_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_h2o_glm.tif")
cq202119_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_rf.tif")
cq202119_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202119_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_202119 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_202119.csv")
auc_cq_202119_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_202119_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq202119 <- stack(x = c(cq202119_glm, cq202119_rf))
weights_cq202119 <- auc_cq_202119$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202119$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq202119 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202119, w = weights_cq202119)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202119)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202119, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202119.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202119 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202119, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202119 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202119)
auc_ensemble_cq202119<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202119, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202119.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq202119_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq202119_h2o_glm, cq202119_h2o_rf))
weights_cq202119_h2o <- auc_cq_202119_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202119_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq202119_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202119_h2o, w = weights_cq202119_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202119_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202119_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202119_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202119_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202119_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202119_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202119_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq202119_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202119_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202119_h2o.csv")


#**YW202132*
cq202132_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_glm.tif")
cq202132_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_h2o_glm.tif")
cq202132_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_rf.tif")
cq202132_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202132_h2o_rf.tif")
```
