```{r}
weights_cq202132 <- auc_cq_202132$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202132$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq202132 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202132, w = weights_cq202132)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202132)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202132, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202132.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202132 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202132, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202132 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202132)
auc_ensemble_cq202132<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202132, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202132.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq202132_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq202132_h2o_glm, cq202132_h2o_rf))
weights_cq202132_h2o <- auc_cq_202132_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202132_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq202132_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202132_h2o, w = weights_cq202132_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202132_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202132_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202132_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202132_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202132_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202132_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202132_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq202132_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202132_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202132_h2o.csv")


#**YW202145*
cq202145_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_glm.tif")
cq202145_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_h2o_glm.tif")
cq202145_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_rf.tif")
cq202145_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/cq202145_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_cq_202145 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_202145.csv")
auc_cq_202145_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_cq_202145_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_cq202145 <- stack(x = c(cq202145_glm, cq202145_rf))
weights_cq202145 <- auc_cq_202145$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202145$AUC)
ensemble_pred_cq202145 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202145, w = weights_cq202145)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202145)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202145, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202145.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202145 <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202145, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202145 <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202145)
auc_ensemble_cq202145<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202145, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202145.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_cq202145_h2o <- stack(x = c(cq202145_h2o_glm, cq202145_h2o_rf))
weights_cq202145_h2o <- auc_cq_202145_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_cq_202145_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_cq202145_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_cq202145_h2o, w = weights_cq202145_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_cq202145_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_cq202145_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_cq202145_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_cq <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_cq.csv"))
test_coords_cq <- test_data_cq[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_cq <- as.numeric(test_data_cq$cq)
ensemble_test_pred_cq202145_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_cq202145_h2o, test_coords_cq, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_cq202145_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_cq$X, test_presence_cq, ensemble_test_pred_cq202145_h2o)
auc_ensemble_cq202145_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_cq202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_cq202145_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_cq202145_h2o.csv")


```


Ensemble model - ct
```{r}

#**YW201319*
ct201319_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_glm.tif")
ct201319_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201319_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_rf.tif")
ct201319_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201319_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201319 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201319.csv")
auc_ct_201319_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201319_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201319 <- stack(x = c(ct201319_glm, ct201319_rf))
weights_ct201319 <- auc_ct_201319$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201319$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201319 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201319, w = weights_ct201319)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201319)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201319, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201319.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201319 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201319, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201319 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201319)
auc_ensemble_ct201319<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201319, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201319.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201319_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201319_h2o_glm, ct201319_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201319_h2o <- auc_ct_201319_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201319_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201319_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201319_h2o, w = weights_ct201319_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201319_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201319_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201319_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201319_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201319_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201319_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201319_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201319_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201319_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201319_h2o.csv")

#**YW201332*
ct201332_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_glm.tif")
ct201332_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201332_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_rf.tif")
ct201332_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201332_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201332 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201332.csv")
auc_ct_201332_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201332_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201332 <- stack(x = c(ct201332_glm, ct201332_rf))
weights_ct201332 <- auc_ct_201332$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201332$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201332 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201332, w = weights_ct201332)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201332)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201332, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201332.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201332 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201332, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201332 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201332)
auc_ensemble_ct201332<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201332, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201332.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201332_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201332_h2o_glm, ct201332_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201332_h2o <- auc_ct_201332_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201332_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201332_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201332_h2o, w = weights_ct201332_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201332_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201332_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201332_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201332_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201332_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201332_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201332_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201332_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201332_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201332_h2o.csv")


#**YW201345*
ct201345_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_glm.tif")
ct201345_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201345_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_rf.tif")
ct201345_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201345_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201345 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201345.csv")
auc_ct_201345_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201345_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201345 <- stack(x = c(ct201345_glm, ct201345_rf))
weights_ct201345 <- auc_ct_201345$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201345$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201345 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201345, w = weights_ct201345)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201345)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201345, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201345.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201345 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201345, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201345 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201345)
auc_ensemble_ct201345<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201345, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201345.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201345_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201345_h2o_glm, ct201345_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201345_h2o <- auc_ct_201345_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201345_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201345_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201345_h2o, w = weights_ct201345_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201345_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201345_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201345_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201345_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201345_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201345_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201345_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201345_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201345_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201345_h2o.csv")


#YW201919
ct201919_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_glm.tif")
ct201919_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201919_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_rf.tif")
ct201919_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201919_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201919 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201919.csv")
auc_ct_201919_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201919_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201919 <- stack(x = c(ct201919_glm, ct201919_rf))
weights_ct201919 <- auc_ct_201919$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201919$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201919 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201919, w = weights_ct201919)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201919)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201919, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201919.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201919 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201919, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201919 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201919)
auc_ensemble_ct201919<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201919, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201919.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201919_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201919_h2o_glm, ct201919_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201919_h2o <- auc_ct_201919_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201919_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201919_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201919_h2o, w = weights_ct201919_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201919_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201919_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201919_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201919_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201919_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201919_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201919_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201919_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201919_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201919_h2o.csv")



#**YW201932*
ct201932_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_glm.tif")
ct201932_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201932_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_rf.tif")
ct201932_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201932_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201932 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201932.csv")
auc_ct_201932_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201932_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201932 <- stack(x = c(ct201932_glm, ct201932_rf))
weights_ct201932 <- auc_ct_201932$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201932$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201932 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201932, w = weights_ct201932)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201932)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201932, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201932.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201932 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201932, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201932 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201932)
auc_ensemble_ct201932<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201932, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201932.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201932_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201932_h2o_glm, ct201932_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201932_h2o <- auc_ct_201932_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201932_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201932_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201932_h2o, w = weights_ct201932_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201932_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201932_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201932_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201932_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201932_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201932_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201932_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201932_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201932_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201932_h2o.csv")



#**YW201945**
ct201945_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_glm.tif")
ct201945_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_h2o_glm.tif")
ct201945_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_rf.tif")
ct201945_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct201945_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_201945 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201945.csv")
auc_ct_201945_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_201945_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct201945 <- stack(x = c(ct201945_glm, ct201945_rf))
weights_ct201945 <- auc_ct_201945$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201945$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct201945 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201945, w = weights_ct201945)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201945)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201945, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201945.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201945 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201945, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201945 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201945)
auc_ensemble_ct201945<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201945, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201945.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct201945_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct201945_h2o_glm, ct201945_h2o_rf))
weights_ct201945_h2o <- auc_ct_201945_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_201945_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct201945_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct201945_h2o, w = weights_ct201945_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct201945_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct201945_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct201945_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct201945_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct201945_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct201945_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct201945_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct201945_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct201945_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct201945_h2o.csv")



#**YW202119*
ct202119_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_glm.tif")
ct202119_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_h2o_glm.tif")
ct202119_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_rf.tif")
ct202119_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202119_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_202119 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202119.csv")
auc_ct_202119_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202119_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct202119 <- stack(x = c(ct202119_glm, ct202119_rf))
weights_ct202119 <- auc_ct_202119$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202119$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct202119 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202119, w = weights_ct202119)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202119)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202119, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202119.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202119 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202119, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202119 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202119)
auc_ensemble_ct202119<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202119, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202119.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct202119_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct202119_h2o_glm, ct202119_h2o_rf))
weights_ct202119_h2o <- auc_ct_202119_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202119_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct202119_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202119_h2o, w = weights_ct202119_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202119_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202119_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202119_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202119_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202119_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202119_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202119_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct202119_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202119_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202119_h2o.csv")


#**YW202132*
ct202132_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_glm.tif")
ct202132_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_h2o_glm.tif")
ct202132_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_rf.tif")
ct202132_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202132_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_202132 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202132.csv")
auc_ct_202132_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202132_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct202132 <- stack(x = c(ct202132_glm, ct202132_rf))
weights_ct202132 <- auc_ct_202132$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202132$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct202132 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202132, w = weights_ct202132)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202132)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202132, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202132.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202132 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202132, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202132 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202132)
auc_ensemble_ct202132<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202132, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202132.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct202132_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct202132_h2o_glm, ct202132_h2o_rf))
weights_ct202132_h2o <- auc_ct_202132_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202132_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct202132_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202132_h2o, w = weights_ct202132_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202132_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202132_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202132_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202132_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202132_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202132_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202132_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct202132_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202132_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202132_h2o.csv")


#**YW202145*
ct202145_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_glm.tif")
ct202145_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_h2o_glm.tif")
ct202145_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_rf.tif")
ct202145_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ct202145_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_ct_202145 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202145.csv")
auc_ct_202145_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_ct_202145_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_ct202145 <- stack(x = c(ct202145_glm, ct202145_rf))
weights_ct202145 <- auc_ct_202145$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202145$AUC)
ensemble_pred_ct202145 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202145, w = weights_ct202145)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202145)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202145, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202145.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202145 <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202145, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202145 <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202145)
auc_ensemble_ct202145<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202145, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202145.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_ct202145_h2o <- stack(x = c(ct202145_h2o_glm, ct202145_h2o_rf))
weights_ct202145_h2o <- auc_ct_202145_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_ct_202145_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_ct202145_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_ct202145_h2o, w = weights_ct202145_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_ct202145_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_ct202145_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_ct202145_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_ct <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_ct.csv"))
test_coords_ct <- test_data_ct[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_ct <- as.numeric(test_data_ct$ct)
ensemble_test_pred_ct202145_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_ct202145_h2o, test_coords_ct, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_ct202145_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_ct$X, test_presence_ct, ensemble_test_pred_ct202145_h2o)
auc_ensemble_ct202145_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_ct202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_ct202145_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_ct202145_h2o.csv")


```


Ensemble AA
```{r}

#**YW201319*
aa201319_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_glm.tif")
aa201319_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201319_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_rf.tif")
aa201319_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201319_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201319 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201319.csv")
auc_aa_201319_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201319_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201319 <- stack(x = c(aa201319_glm, aa201319_rf))
weights_aa201319 <- auc_aa_201319$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201319$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201319 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201319, w = weights_aa201319)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201319)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201319, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201319.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201319 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201319, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201319 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201319)
auc_ensemble_aa201319<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201319, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201319.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201319_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201319_h2o_glm, aa201319_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201319_h2o <- auc_aa_201319_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201319_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201319_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201319_h2o, w = weights_aa201319_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201319_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201319_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201319_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201319_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201319_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201319_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201319_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201319_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201319, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201319_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201319_h2o.csv")

#**YW201332*
aa201332_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_glm.tif")
aa201332_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201332_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_rf.tif")
aa201332_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201332_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201332 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201332.csv")
auc_aa_201332_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201332_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201332 <- stack(x = c(aa201332_glm, aa201332_rf))
weights_aa201332 <- auc_aa_201332$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201332$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201332 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201332, w = weights_aa201332)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201332)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201332, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201332.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201332 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201332, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201332 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201332)
auc_ensemble_aa201332<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201332, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201332.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201332_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201332_h2o_glm, aa201332_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201332_h2o <- auc_aa_201332_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201332_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201332_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201332_h2o, w = weights_aa201332_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201332_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201332_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201332_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201332_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201332_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201332_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201332_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201332_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201332, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201332_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201332_h2o.csv")


#**YW201345*
aa201345_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_glm.tif")
aa201345_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201345_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_rf.tif")
aa201345_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201345_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201345 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201345.csv")
auc_aa_201345_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201345_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201345 <- stack(x = c(aa201345_glm, aa201345_rf))
weights_aa201345 <- auc_aa_201345$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201345$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201345 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201345, w = weights_aa201345)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201345)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201345, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201345.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201345 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201345, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201345 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201345)
auc_ensemble_aa201345<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201345, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201345.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201345_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201345_h2o_glm, aa201345_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201345_h2o <- auc_aa_201345_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201345_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201345_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201345_h2o, w = weights_aa201345_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201345_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201345_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201345_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201345_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201345_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201345_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201345_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201345_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201345, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201345_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201345_h2o.csv")


#YW201919
aa201919_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_glm.tif")
aa201919_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201919_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_rf.tif")
aa201919_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201919_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201919 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201919.csv")
auc_aa_201919_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201919_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201919 <- stack(x = c(aa201919_glm, aa201919_rf))
weights_aa201919 <- auc_aa_201919$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201919$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201919 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201919, w = weights_aa201919)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201919)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201919, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201919.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201919 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201919, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201919 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201919)
auc_ensemble_aa201919<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201919, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201919.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201919_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201919_h2o_glm, aa201919_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201919_h2o <- auc_aa_201919_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201919_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201919_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201919_h2o, w = weights_aa201919_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201919_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201919_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201919_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201919_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201919_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201919_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201919_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201919_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201919, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201919_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201919_h2o.csv")



#**YW201932*
aa201932_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_glm.tif")
aa201932_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201932_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_rf.tif")
aa201932_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201932_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201932 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201932.csv")
auc_aa_201932_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201932_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201932 <- stack(x = c(aa201932_glm, aa201932_rf))
weights_aa201932 <- auc_aa_201932$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201932$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201932 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201932, w = weights_aa201932)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201932)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201932, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201932.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201932 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201932, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201932 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201932)
auc_ensemble_aa201932<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201932, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201932.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201932_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201932_h2o_glm, aa201932_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201932_h2o <- auc_aa_201932_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201932_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201932_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201932_h2o, w = weights_aa201932_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201932_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201932_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201932_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201932_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201932_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201932_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201932_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201932_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201932, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201932_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201932_h2o.csv")



#**YW201945**
aa201945_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_glm.tif")
aa201945_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_glm.tif")
aa201945_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_rf.tif")
aa201945_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa201945_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_201945 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201945.csv")
auc_aa_201945_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_201945_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa201945 <- stack(x = c(aa201945_glm, aa201945_rf))
weights_aa201945 <- auc_aa_201945$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201945$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa201945 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201945, w = weights_aa201945)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201945)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201945, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201945.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201945 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201945, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201945 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201945)
auc_ensemble_aa201945<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201945, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201945.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa201945_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa201945_h2o_glm, aa201945_h2o_rf))
weights_aa201945_h2o <- auc_aa_201945_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_201945_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa201945_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa201945_h2o, w = weights_aa201945_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa201945_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa201945_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa201945_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa201945_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa201945_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa201945_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa201945_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa201945_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa201945, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa201945_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa201945_h2o.csv")



#**YW202119*
aa202119_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_glm.tif")
aa202119_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_glm.tif")
aa202119_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_rf.tif")
aa202119_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202119_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_202119 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202119.csv")
auc_aa_202119_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202119_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa202119 <- stack(x = c(aa202119_glm, aa202119_rf))
weights_aa202119 <- auc_aa_202119$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202119$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa202119 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202119, w = weights_aa202119)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202119)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202119, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202119.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202119 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202119, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202119 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202119)
auc_ensemble_aa202119<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202119, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202119.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa202119_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa202119_h2o_glm, aa202119_h2o_rf))
weights_aa202119_h2o <- auc_aa_202119_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202119_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa202119_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202119_h2o, w = weights_aa202119_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202119_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202119_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202119_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202119_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202119_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202119_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202119_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa202119_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202119, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202119_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202119_h2o.csv")


#**YW202132*
aa202132_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_glm.tif")
aa202132_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_glm.tif")
aa202132_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_rf.tif")
aa202132_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202132_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_202132 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202132.csv")
auc_aa_202132_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202132_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa202132 <- stack(x = c(aa202132_glm, aa202132_rf))
weights_aa202132 <- auc_aa_202132$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202132$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa202132 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202132, w = weights_aa202132)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202132)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202132, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202132.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202132 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202132, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202132 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202132)
auc_ensemble_aa202132<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202132, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202132.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa202132_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa202132_h2o_glm, aa202132_h2o_rf))
weights_aa202132_h2o <- auc_aa_202132_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202132_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa202132_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202132_h2o, w = weights_aa202132_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202132_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202132_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202132_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202132_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202132_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202132_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202132_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa202132_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202132, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202132_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202132_h2o.csv")


#**YW202145*
aa202145_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_glm.tif")
aa202145_h2o_glm <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_glm.tif")
aa202145_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_rf.tif")
aa202145_h2o_rf <- raster("/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/aa202145_h2o_rf.tif")
auc_aa_202145 <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202145.csv")
auc_aa_202145_h2o <- read.csv("C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC/auc_aa_202145_h2o.csv")

#ensemble no water
pred_stack_aa202145 <- stack(x = c(aa202145_glm, aa202145_rf))
weights_aa202145 <- auc_aa_202145$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202145$AUC)
ensemble_pred_aa202145 <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202145, w = weights_aa202145)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202145)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202145, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202145.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC 
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202145 <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202145, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202145 <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202145)
auc_ensemble_aa202145<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202145, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202145.csv")

#h2o
pred_stack_aa202145_h2o <- stack(x = c(aa202145_h2o_glm, aa202145_h2o_rf))
weights_aa202145_h2o <- auc_aa_202145_h2o$AUC / sum(auc_aa_202145_h2o$AUC)

ensemble_pred_aa202145_h2o <- weighted.mean(pred_stack_aa202145_h2o, w = weights_aa202145_h2o)
plot(ensemble_pred_aa202145_h2o)
writeRaster(ensemble_pred_aa202145_h2o, file = "/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/prediction/ensemble_pred_aa202145_h2o.tif")

#using test data now to get AUC
test_data_aa <- read.csv(here("Natalie/data_cleaned/test_train/test_data_aa.csv"))
test_coords_aa <- test_data_aa[, c("Longitude", "Latitude")]
test_presence_aa <- as.numeric(test_data_aa$aa)
ensemble_test_pred_aa202145_h2o <- extract(ensemble_pred_aa202145_h2o, test_coords_aa, pos_label = 1)
ensemble_auc_df_aa202145_h2o <- data.frame(test_data_aa$X, test_presence_aa, ensemble_test_pred_aa202145_h2o)
auc_ensemble_aa202145_h2o<- PresenceAbsence ::auc(ensemble_auc_df_aa202145, which.model = 1, na.rm = TRUE)
write.csv(auc_ensemble_aa202145_h2o, file = "C:/Users/nooni/Box/RNR597_data/AUC_ensemble/auc_ensemble_aa202145_h2o.csv")


```
